subcodes.first_line: In this day all atoms are witnessed in a state of supreme attraction and exultation, for the fragrance of the garment of Joseph of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جمیع ذرات بکمال جذب و شور مشاهده میشوند چه که عرف قمیص یوسف معانی را
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech, @empty learning; false spirituality, @suffering and imprisonment
